Name: ENEMY_ATTACK_MOVE_PARAM
Description: Defines movement, rotation, timing, and behavior modifiers used by enemy attacks, including melee dash behavior, ranged movement penalties, and attack tracking adjustments.

Fields.Name: Melee Attack: Movement Acceleration
Fields.Description: Acceleration (m/s²) applied when an enemy moves forward during a melee attack.

Fields.Name: Melee Attack: Movement Speed
Fields.Description: Movement speed (m/s) used during melee attack dash behavior.

Fields.Name: Attack Rotation Speed (Low Speed)
Fields.Description: Turning speed (deg/s) when the enemy is moving slowly during an attack.

Fields.Name: Attack Rotation Speed (High Speed)
Fields.Description: Turning speed (deg/s) when the enemy is moving quickly during an attack.

Fields.Name: Low-Speed Rotation Threshold
Fields.Description: Movement speed threshold (m/s) below which low-speed rotation rules are applied.

Fields.Name: High-Speed Rotation Threshold
Fields.Description: Movement speed threshold (m/s) above which high-speed rotation rules are applied.

Fields.Name: Melee Attack Range
Fields.Description: Effective attack range (m) used during melee dash attacks.

Fields.Name: Attack Start Speed %
Fields.Description: Speed multiplier applied during the initial wind-up phase of an attack.

Fields.Name: Attack End Speed %
Fields.Description: Speed multiplier applied during the follow-through phase of an attack.

Fields.Name: Secondary Rotation %
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to secondary turning adjustments during attack tracking.

Fields.Name: Attack Timeout Duration
Fields.Description: Maximum duration (sec) allowed for attack movement before timing out.

Fields.Name: Target Prediction Time
Fields.Description: Time (sec) used to predict target future position for attack tracking.

Fields.Name: Ranged Movement Slowdown %
Fields.Description: Movement speed multiplier applied while performing ranged attacks.

Fields.Name: Rotation Pivot Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the dummy polygon used as the rotation pivot axis.

Fields.Name: Cancel on Failed Attack Dash
Fields.Description: Flag that cancels attack behavior if a dash attempt fails.

Fields.Name: Disable Obstacle Collision Check
Fields.Description: If enabled, ignores obstacle collision detection during attack movement.
